channel.title: maGaming RSS Feed - techraptor.net
channel.description: A cleaned-up version of the original gaming feed for techraptor.net

item.title: Enshrouded 1.0 Release Date Revealed
item.content:encoded:
Keen Games has announced the Enshrouded 1.0 release date, when their acclaimed early access survival game will drop the early access title after three years in that state.

What is the Enshrouded Release Date?

The Enshrouded release date for 1.0 is set for October 15th, 2026. This is the same date as the PlayStation 5 release that was just confirmedas well, as the game makes its first trip onto console.

Initially planned to launch simultaneously on PlayStation 5, and Xbox Series X|S, the latter version was delayed by Keen Games until Spring 2027. 

Jan Jockel, the CEO of Keen Games, explained the decision for the delay as follows:

"Our team worked tirelessly to bring 1.0 and its exciting new content to both the PS5 and Xbox X|S editions, with the goal of launching everywhere at once. Our game pushes a lot of complex systems at once like deep terraforming and building at a scale we're really proud of. Bringing all of that to two console platforms simultaneously proved more demanding than we anticipated. 

Rather than rush, we made the call to focus and get each version right. We refuse to compromise on the quality of the game, and we know Xbox players expect the best. Work on the Xbox X|S edition is ongoing, and we plan to launch it in spring 2027. Players can look forward to more details about 1.0 this summer."

This comes only a couple months after the major 'Forging the Path' update which was the largest yet for Enshrouded, including a complete combat overhaul and the first version of their adventure sharing which lets players share builds with each other. It also helped clean up the path for 1.0 by reworking aspects like the tutorial, and quality of life aspects, which we can expect to see more of over the next few months. That's not to say that Enshrouded 1.0 will be the end of the game - Keen Games plans to continue development on the game for the long term.

A longtime lover of speculative fiction, in almost all its forms, Don joined TechRaptor in 2014 on a whim sending in an application as he was looking for… More about Don
